name: Bittensor
one_liner: Decentralized market for machine intelligence with 128 subnets

revenue_or_volume.value: $3-15M actual external revenue annually; ~$148M annual TAO emission subsidies

entry_mechanisms.pair_or_url: Stake TAO into specific subnets for Alpha tokens

key_backers.name: Grayscale
key_backers.amount: 43% allocation in fund; S-1 for TAO spot ETF filed

catalysts.event: Grayscale TAO spot ETF approval (S-1 filed on NYSE)
Europe's first Staked TAO ETP launched on SIX Swiss Exchange
December 2025 halving cut emissions to 3,600 TAO/day
Grayscale boosted TAO allocation from 31% to 43%

risks.risk: Subsidy-to-revenue ratio of 22-40:1 — only $3-15M real revenue vs $148M emissions
Covenant AI exit exposed governance centralization and 'decentralization theatre' allegations
No formal security audit submitted; $8M exploit July 2024 via PyPI supply chain attack
Network was halted unilaterally during July 2024 hack — undermines decentralization

toy_phase_dismissal.evidence: AI x Crypto sector widely dismissed as 'AI-washing'; but institutional interest (Grayscale ETF) means it's partially past toy phase

working_code.evidence: 128 active subnets live, Covenant-72B model trained collaboratively across 70+ contributors on commodity hardware competing with Llama 2 70B

ideological_community.evidence: Strong decentralized AI ideology; 68-77% staking ratio; validators up 34% MoM; but Covenant AI exit revealed community fractures

developer_activity.evidence: 128 active subnets (from 32 a year ago); validators up 34% MoM; multiple subnet teams building

smart_money_entry.evidence: Grayscale 43% allocation, S-1 ETF filing, European ETP on SIX Swiss Exchange, Jensen Huang endorsement

narrative_clarity.evidence: Clear narrative: 'decentralized market for AI' — fits in one sentence

hard_to_buy.evidence: Available on Binance and Coinbase — easy to buy; subnet tokens harder

catalyst_proximity.evidence: ETF filing pending, post-halving supply dynamics, institutional on-ramps active

name: Templar (Bittensor SN3)
one_liner: Bittensor subnet token with 444% March surge

entry_mechanisms.pair_or_url: Stake TAO into SN3 for Alpha tokens

risks.risk: Crashed -57.5% during Covenant AI exit event
Dependent on Bittensor ecosystem health and emissions

toy_phase_dismissal.evidence: Subnet tokens are dismissed even within crypto; most investors don't understand subnets

working_code.evidence: Active subnet on Bittensor but limited detail on specific product

developer_activity.evidence: Active subnet but limited public data on development

smart_money_entry.evidence: No specific institutional backing mentioned beyond Bittensor ecosystem

narrative_clarity.evidence: Clear as a subnet play within Bittensor ecosystem

hard_to_buy.evidence: Must stake TAO into subnets — complex process

name: Chutes (Bittensor SN64)
one_liner: Top Bittensor subnet processing 9.1T tokens with revenue

revenue_or_volume.value: $1.3-2.4M real revenue; $5.5M annualized; receives ~$52M in annualized subsidies

entry_mechanisms.pair_or_url: Stake TAO into SN64 for Alpha tokens

catalysts.event: Highest real revenue subnet — potential for organic growth

risks.risk: Receives ~$52M in subsidies for ~$2.4M revenue — 22:1 subsidy ratio

toy_phase_dismissal.evidence: Subnet tokens dismissed even within crypto community

working_code.evidence: Processing 9.1T tokens with $1.3-2.4M in real external revenue — top subnet by revenue

developer_activity.evidence: Active subnet with real usage metrics

narrative_clarity.evidence: Clear value prop: decentralized AI inference with real revenue

hard_to_buy.evidence: Must stake TAO into subnets — complex process

catalyst_proximity.evidence: Revenue growth trajectory is the catalyst
